blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,441 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 42 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 30°F, gusts to 42 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 38".
